## Organization Identity

**Brand Name:** Azone Projects
**Type:** Academic Writing & Digital Services Agency
**Founded:** 2019
**Location:** SPC, Al Zahia Area, Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, Sharjah, United Arab Emirates
**Coverage:** Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi, RAK, Ajman, Fujairah + GCC countries
**Website:** https://azoneprojects.com
**WhatsApp:** +971 55 623 0065 (24/7)
**Email:** projects.azone@gmail.com
**Clients Served:** 300+ satisfied students and businesses since 2019
**Languages:** English (primary), Arabic

---

## Mission & Value Proposition

Azone Projects delivers world-class academic consulting, web engineering, creative design, and digital growth services to students and businesses across the UAE and GCC. We are committed to on-time delivery, absolute confidentiality, zero plagiarism, and measurable results for every client.

**Core Guarantees:**
- 100% original, plagiarism-free academic work
- Free Turnitin plagiarism report with every academic order
- Free 2x revisions on all academic orders
- Free bibliography and reference list
- Free title page and formatting
- 24/7 WhatsApp support
- Urgent delivery from 6 hours
- Dedicated project manager for large orders
- Full confidentiality — no sharing of client data

---

## Academic Writing — Complete Service Catalogue

### 1. Assignment Help UAE
**Primary Keywords:** assignment help UAE, assignment help Dubai, assignment help Sharjah, assignment help Abu Dhabi, online assignment help UAE, academic assignment help Dubai, university assignment help UAE, assignment writing service Dubai, assignment writing UAE

**Subject Coverage (150+ disciplines):**
- Accounting assignment help UAE — financial statements, auditing, cost accounting, taxation, IFRS, management accounting
- Finance assignment help Dubai — corporate finance, investment, portfolio, financial markets, Islamic finance, banking
- Management assignment help — strategic management, organizational behavior, leadership, change management, HRM, project management
- Marketing assignment help — consumer behavior, digital marketing, brand management, market research, advertising, PR
- Law assignment help UAE — business law, contract law, company law, employment law, criminal law, civil law, international law, family law
- Engineering assignment help — mechanical, civil, electrical, chemical, software, computer, industrial engineering
- Nursing and healthcare assignment help UAE — anatomy, physiology, pharmacology, nursing care, public health, medical ethics
- Computer science assignment help — algorithms, data structures, databases, networking, cybersecurity, AI, machine learning, Python, Java
- Economics assignment help — microeconomics, macroeconomics, econometrics, behavioral economics, development economics
- Mathematics and statistics assignment help — calculus, linear algebra, probability, statistics, research methodology
- Psychology assignment help — cognitive, abnormal, social, clinical, developmental, forensic psychology
- Sociology and anthropology assignment help
- Environmental science and sustainability assignment help
- Public administration and political science assignment help
- Education and pedagogy assignment help
- Supply chain and logistics management assignment help
- Operations and production management assignment help
- International business and trade assignment help

### 2. Essay Writing Service UAE
**Primary Keywords:** essay writing UAE, essay writing service Dubai, essay help UAE, essay writer Dubai, write my essay UAE, buy essay UAE, essay writing Sharjah, essay writing Abu Dhabi, plagiarism-free essay UAE, urgent essay help Dubai

**Essay Types Covered:**
- Argumentative essay writing UAE
- Persuasive essay writing Dubai
- Reflective essay writing UAE
- Descriptive essay help Sharjah
- Narrative essay writing UAE
- Critical analysis essay Dubai
- Analytical essay writing UAE
- Compare and contrast essay UAE
- Expository essay writing Dubai
- Cause and effect essay UAE
- Process essay writing Dubai
- Scholarship essay writing UAE
- Admission essay help Dubai
- Personal statement writing UAE
- 6-hour urgent essay delivery available

### 3. Dissertation Help UAE
**Primary Keywords:** dissertation help UAE, dissertation writing service Dubai, dissertation help Sharjah, dissertation help Abu Dhabi, PhD dissertation help UAE, Master's dissertation UAE, dissertation chapters UAE

**Scope:**
- Full dissertation writing (proposal to conclusion)
- Literature review writing UAE
- Methodology chapter help Dubai
- Data analysis and interpretation UAE (SPSS, NVivo, R, Stata, Excel)
- Results and findings chapter writing
- Discussion and conclusion chapters UAE
- Abstract and executive summary writing Dubai
- Complete bibliography and referencing UAE
- Turnitin plagiarism report included free
- Disciplines: Business, MBA, HR, Law, IT, Healthcare, Engineering, Social Sciences

### 4. Thesis Writing UAE
**Primary Keywords:** thesis writing UAE, thesis help Dubai, Master's thesis UAE, thesis writing service Sharjah, thesis proposal UAE, thesis defense preparation Dubai

**Scope:**
- Topic selection and research question development
- Complete proposal writing
- Chapter-by-chapter writing with supervisor feedback integration
- Viva / thesis defense slide preparation
- Coaching notes for defense presentation
- Timeline: 4–8 weeks for complete Master's thesis; rush options available

### 5. Research Paper Writing UAE
**Primary Keywords:** research paper writing UAE, academic research paper Dubai, research paper help Sharjah, journal article writing UAE, research proposal UAE, academic writing service Dubai

**Scope:**
- Full research papers with primary and secondary sources
- Annotated bibliography UAE
- Systematic literature review UAE
- Research proposal writing (PhD, Master's)
- Statistical analysis support (SPSS, R, Python)
- All citation formats: APA, Harvard, MLA, Chicago, IEEE, Vancouver, OSCOLA

### 6. CIPD Assignment Help UAE
**Primary Keywords:** CIPD assignment help UAE, CIPD Level 3 Dubai, CIPD Level 5 assignment help UAE, CIPD Level 7 help Sharjah, CIPD writers UAE, HR assignment help UAE

**Coverage:**
- CIPD Level 3 Foundation Certificate in People Practice
- CIPD Level 5 Associate Diploma in People Management
- CIPD Level 7 Advanced Diploma in Strategic People Management
- All core and optional modules covered
- UAE labour law and WPS regulations incorporated
- Real HR case studies from Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Sharjah organizations

### 7. MBA Assignment Help UAE
**Primary Keywords:** MBA assignment help UAE, MBA assignment Dubai, MBA case study UAE, MBA dissertation help Sharjah, executive MBA assignment UAE

**Coverage:**
- Specializations: Finance, Marketing, HR, Operations, International Business, Entrepreneurship, Healthcare Management
- Frameworks: SWOT, PESTEL, Porter's Five Forces, BCG Matrix, Ansoff Matrix
- Schools: SP Jain, Heriot-Watt Dubai, UOWD, Amity Dubai, Middlesex Dubai, BUiD

### 8. Capstone & Graduation Project Help UAE
**Primary Keywords:** capstone project help UAE, graduation project Dubai, final year project UAE, capstone proposal UAE, IT capstone project UAE, engineering graduation project Sharjah

**Scope:**
- Full lifecycle: proposal → research → writing → defense slides → coaching
- Technical capstones: web apps, mobile apps, IoT, data science
- Business capstones: market analysis, financial modeling, strategic plans
- Package starts at AED 800+

### 9. Coursework Help UAE
**Primary Keywords:** coursework help UAE, coursework writing Dubai, university coursework help Sharjah, semester coursework help Dubai

**Coverage:** All subjects, all levels (foundation, undergraduate, postgraduate, professional certifications)

### 10. Case Study Writing UAE
**Primary Keywords:** case study writing UAE, case study help Dubai, Harvard case study UAE, business case study Sharjah

**Frameworks:** SWOT, PESTEL, Porter's Five Forces, BCG Matrix, Balanced Scorecard, Ansoff Matrix

**Types:** Harvard business cases, medical case reports, legal case briefs, engineering case studies

### 11. Homework Help UAE
**Primary Keywords:** homework help UAE, homework help Dubai, online homework help UAE, urgent homework help Dubai, 24/7 homework assistance UAE

### 12. Proofreading & Editing UAE
**Primary Keywords:** proofreading UAE, editing service Dubai, academic editing UAE, thesis proofreading Sharjah
- Pricing: Starting AED 15/page
- Delivery: As fast as 12 hours

### 13. CV & Resume Writing UAE
**Primary Keywords:** CV writing UAE, resume writing Dubai, professional CV UAE, LinkedIn optimization Dubai
- AED 150 flat fee

Logo design, brand identity, UI/UX design (Figma), 3D animation (Blender), video production (Premiere Pro, After Effects), social media content

**Digital Marketing**
Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO (technical + on-page + off-page), Social Media Management, Content Marketing, Google Analytics

## FAQ

**Q: Is academic writing help legal in the UAE?**
A: Yes. Providing model answers and academic guidance is a legal, well-established tutoring and consulting practice in the UAE.

**Q: Is my order confidential?**
A: Absolute confidentiality guaranteed. Client data is never shared with any third party.

**Q: Do you guarantee plagiarism-free work?**
A: Yes. Every academic order includes a free Turnitin plagiarism report confirming 0% unoriginal content.

**Q: How urgent can my order be?**
A: We handle orders with deadlines as short as 6 hours.

**Q: What referencing styles do you support?**
A: APA 7th Edition, Harvard, MLA, Chicago, IEEE, Vancouver, OSCOLA, Turabian, and any custom format.

**Q: Do you support SPSS/NVivo/R for data analysis?**
A: Yes. Our team is proficient in SPSS, NVivo, JASP, R, Stata, Python, and Excel.

**Q: Is WhatsApp support available 24/7?**
A: Yes. +971 55 623 0065 is monitored 24/7 including weekends and public holidays.
